title: AI Crypto Swap Quote Checker: Safe Quote Checks
keyQuestions: Can AI compare crypto swap quotes?
Can AI tell whether a crypto swap quote is fair?
What should I avoid pasting into an AI chat before a swap?
Should I use fixed or floating if I am checking a quote with AI?
What should I do if the quote expires while I am asking AI?
How can I compare crypto swap quotes without exposing private wallet data?
quickSteps: Remove private data before asking AI, including addresses, route IDs, secret tokens, screenshots, seed phrases, and support case details.
Map the quote fields in plain language: pair, rate type, timer, input, expected output, network, and visible fee concern.
Compare the final destination amount, not only the advertised fee, because spread, network cost, and slippage can change the real result.
Check timing and rate type before sending, especially when a fixed quote has a short timer or a floating quote can move with the market.
Verify the quote, wallet, network, and address manually before sending; stop if the facts do not match or the quote has expired.

issueRouting.start: The user wants to use AI to review a crypto swap quote without exposing private transaction data.

branches.if: The user has not sent funds yet
then: Describe the quote fields without private identifiers.
Compare rate type, timer, network, fees, spread, and expected output.
Verify the quote page, wallet, network, and address manually before sending.

branches.if: The quote is fixed, short on time, or already expired
then: Stop and check whether the timer is still valid.
Refresh the quote if no funds have been sent.
Avoid sending after expiry unless the live route instructions clearly match.
Stop comparing quotes and check route status instead.
Confirm the source-chain transaction and visible confirmations.
Share only narrow support details if escalation is needed.

riskNotes: AI should not receive seed phrases, private keys, secret tokens, route IDs, or full wallet screenshots.
A screenshot can expose balances, browser extensions, timestamps, case IDs, unrelated tabs, and other private context.
AI can explain fixed and floating quote logic, but it cannot guarantee final execution or verify wallet ownership.
An expired quote should be treated as a stop-and-check signal, not a reason to rush another transaction.
The real quote comparison should focus on final destination output, not only the advertised service fee.
